## What Exists Today

<!-- Describe the current behaviour or implementation you want to improve.
     Be specific: which crate, plugin, system, or public API is involved? -->

## What Could Be Better

<!-- Explain what is lacking, inefficient, confusing, or painful about the current state.
     Focus on the problem, not the solution. -->

## Proposed Improvement

<!-- Describe the change you'd like to see. How should the behaviour or API differ after this improvement?
     Consider:
     - Which crate(s) are affected (dd40_core, dd40_world, dd40_player_input, etc.)?
     - Are any public APIs changing? If so, is this a breaking change?
     - Does this affect system ordering (BlockRegistrySet, WorldGenerationSet, etc.)?
     - Are there doc comments, examples, or tests that also need updating? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this improvement worth making? What does it unlock or make easier?
     Include benchmarks, profiling results, or concrete examples if relevant. -->

<!-- List the conditions that must be true for this improvement to be considered complete. -->

- [ ] <!-- criterion 1 -->
- [ ] <!-- criterion 2 -->
